headline: Open Mixture-of-Experts scaling led the quarter as Meituan released a 1.6 trillion parameter model trained on AI ASIC superpods.
body: Meituan's LongCat-2.0 anchored the window, pairing 1.6T total parameters with sparse attention that activates roughly 48B per token, trained for long-context, coding, and agentic work on ASIC superpods rather than GPUs, with weights uploading to Hugging Face. The broader open versus frontier gap is reported as narrowing fast, and Chinese models are gaining adoption on cost and data sovereignty grounds. On the technique side, retrieval and agentic methods broke out, including vector search, HNSW, loop agents, and spec-driven development, while safety layer, deterministic rules, event logging, and cross-document intelligence entered as new outliers. Startups are also building proprietary models for defensibility, with Wix-owned Base44 rolling out its own model.
